answer: BigCommerce does not offer a free tier for production stores. However, you can access the developer API for free by signing up for a 15-day free trial, which allows you to build and test integrations without affecting live data [1][2]. API access is available on all self-serve plans, though rate limits vary by tier, with Standard and Plus limited to 20,000 requests per hour and Pro limited to 60,000 [3]. You can manage API credentials by navigating to Settings and then API Accounts within your store control panel [2].
